title: WellFit Agent-to-Task Draft
description: Machine-readable schema for report-only agent findings that may become reviewed WellFit task drafts. This schema does not authorize execution, writes, merge, deploy, reward, token, payment, health, child, privacy or location authority.

source_agent.description: Agent or report that proposed this task.

reason.description: Why the task exists and what problem it solves.

affected_files.description: Files expected to be read or possibly touched after approval.

allowed_paths.description: Explicit path allowlist for the later task.

blocked_paths.description: Paths or scopes that remain blocked. Blocked paths override allowed paths.

human_approval_required.description: All generated task drafts require human approval before execution.

stop_conditions.description: Conditions that stop execution and require review.
